description_long: This rectangular picnic basket features a tightly woven exterior in deep blue and natural beige tones, creating a visually striking contrast. The basket has a sturdy, reinforced rim and integrated rectangular cut-out handles on the shorter sides for easy carrying. The weave is consistent and dense, providing both durability and a semi-rigid structure. The interior is spacious and open, with the same woven pattern extending to the base and sides. There is no lid, leaving the contents easily accessible from above. The overall design is functional yet stylish, suitable for carrying food, utensils, or personal items in urban parks or outdoor gatherings.
description: A rectangular, blue and beige woven picnic basket with open top and integrated cut-out handles. The basket is sturdy, spacious, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the long side of the basket with a continuous woven pattern and no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular cut-out handle and the basket's depth, with the woven pattern visible on all surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view identical to the front, displaying the long woven side without handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another cut-out handle, mirroring view 1.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed, rectangular cut-out handles integrated into the short sides, made from the same woven fiber as the basket.
attribute_weave_pattern: Plain, tight weave with alternating blue and beige fibers, creating a subtle checkered effect.
